item.title: Why astronauts need heat shields
item.description: The real reason that astronauts need heat shields!

media:content.media:title: Why astronauts need heat shields
media:content.media:description: The real reason that astronauts need heat shields!

item.title: Falling into a black hole
item.description: In this video I show you what it actually looks like to drop different things into a black hole! I talk about gravitational lensing, gravitational time dilation and gravitational red shifting. All of this to show you what it would actually look like to watch something fall into a black hole.

media:content.media:title: Falling into a black hole
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what it actually looks like to drop different things into a black hole! I talk about gravitational lensing, gravitational time dilation and gravitational red shifting. All of this to show you what it would actually look like to watch something fall into a black hole.

item.title: Powder reaction
item.description: Why a powder behaves this way in a simple science demonstration.

media:content.media:title: Powder reaction
media:content.media:description: Why a powder behaves this way in a simple science demonstration.

item.title: Indoor skydiving explains rocket motion
item.description: In this video I go indoor skydiving in order to answer a very interesting question! If you have a ball (or person) floating above a high strength fan on a scale, does the scale feel the weight of the ball or person?

media:content.media:title: Indoor skydiving explains rocket motion
media:content.media:description: In this video I go indoor skydiving in order to answer a very interesting question! If you have a ball (or person) floating above a high strength fan on a scale, does the scale feel the weight of the ball or person?

item.title: Exposing the fortune teller "miracle" fish!
item.description: The Action Lab explores the fortune teller fish and looks at the science behind the trick.

media:content.media:title: Exposing the fortune teller "miracle" fish!
media:content.media:description: The Action Lab explores the fortune teller fish and looks at the science behind the trick.

item.title: The volcano reaction you didn't do in school
item.description: I do a volcano experiment that produces heat and ash just like a real volcano

media:content.media:title: The volcano reaction you didn't do in school
media:content.media:description: I do a volcano experiment that produces heat and ash just like a real volcano
